name: 42"W x 84"L All Over Kids' Blackout Window Curtain Panel Floral Print - Pillowfort™
description: Help your child sleep through the early hours of the morning with this 84-Inch Blackout Window Panel from Pillowfort™. This curtain panel features a vibrant floral pattern set against a pristine white background to infuse garden-inspired charm into their bedroom decor. The blackout design effectively blocks out light, promoting a peaceful environment for restful sleep, and with its classic rod pocket design, installation is quick and hassle-free.
